scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('dist/build.txt','config package baseline\n');console.log('config package baseline emitted')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('config package has no lint target')"
scripts.typecheck: node -e "console.log('config package has no typecheck target')"
